triple.what: CTO at CBS Northstar (cbsnorthstar.com) -- built nearly every software product they sell. 9 products, 10,000+ operators, restaurants to convenience stores.
triple.proud: Land, sea, and air. The entire product suite came from my hands. 30 years of hospitality tech, and my code is still the foundation.

triple.what: Built NorthStar Digital Signage -- real-time, instant-updating customer communication displays
triple.proud: Menu boards, promotions, wait times -- all updated in real time from the same system that runs the restaurant.

triple.what: Built NorthStar Kitchen Display Systems -- integrated displays, bump bars, kitchen coordination
triple.proud: Every ticket flows from POS to kitchen to plate. The back of house runs on this.

triple.what: Built NorthStar Labor Management -- integrated workforce optimization and scheduling
triple.proud: Labor is the biggest cost in hospitality. This system optimizes it across the entire operation.

triple.what: Built NorthStar Loyalty and Gift Cards -- customer retention programs and gift card management
triple.proud: Loyalty drives repeat business. Built the system that keeps customers coming back.

triple.what: Built NorthStar Online Ordering -- omnichannel ordering across multiple customer touchpoints
triple.proud: Customers order from anywhere. The system handles it all.

triple.what: Built NorthStar Payment Processing -- flexible payment processor integration
triple.proud: Your choice of processor, not ours. Built the abstraction layer that makes it work with any provider.

triple.what: Built the NorthStar Point of Sale -- cloud-based POS platform powering 10,000+ restaurant operators
triple.proud: The core product. Omnichannel, scalable, ran across restaurants, fast casual, QSR, grocery, and convenience stores.

triple.what: Built NorthStar Recipe Management -- protects and manages proprietary food preparation procedures
triple.proud: Recipes are trade secrets. This system guards them while making them operationally accessible.
